gold_claims.text: NovaAI was founded in 2021 by Dr.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: Mara Chen and Lucas Ferreira.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: NovaAI reached a $1.4B valuation through its Series C round, which was completed in November 2025 and led by Horizon Ventures.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: Total funding stands at $210M.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: NovaAI has 312 full-time employees as of Q1 2026.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: The company has offices in San Francisco, London (opened 2023), and Singapore (opened 2024).
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: NovaAI's primary market verticals are financial services, healthcare, and logistics.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: Dr.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: Mara Chen is the CEO and co-founder of NovaAI.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: She joined in January 2021 when the company was founded and is based in San Francisco.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: Sofia Andersson is the VP of Engineering.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: Engineering has four sub-teams: Platform Infrastructure (led by Raj Mehta), ML Systems (led by Dr.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: Yuki Tanaka), Product Engineering (led by Carlos Rivera), and Security Engineering (led by Ananya Bose).
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: Derek Shin is NovaAI's General Counsel.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: He joined the company in-house in May 2023 and previously worked at Cooley LLP.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: Legal is also overseen by CFO Priya Nambiar.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: Marcus Webb is the Enterprise Sales team lead.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: He is based in New York with an approved fully remote work arrangement.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: His FY2026 quota is $18M.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: The NovaPilot Starter plan costs $2,500/month.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: It includes up to 10 users and 50,000 automation runs per month.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: The NovaPilot Growth plan costs $8,000/month.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: It supports up to 50 users, 500,000 automation runs per month, and includes audit logs.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: NovaPilot Enterprise is priced at $30,000–$120,000/month.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: It includes unlimited users, a dedicated CSM, 99.95% SLA uptime, private cloud deployment on AWS or Azure, and HIPAA-compliant data handling.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: NovaPilot is NovaAI's flagship product, launched in Q3 2022.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: It is an AI workflow automation platform that integrates with 120+ third-party tools including Salesforce, SAP, and ServiceNow.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: NovaLens Professional costs $4,000/month and supports 5 users, 3 data connectors, and monthly model refresh.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: NovaLens Business costs $12,000/month and supports 20 users, 15 data connectors, weekly model refresh, and custom dashboards.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: NovaLens supports connectors for Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery, Redshift, and PostgreSQL.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: NovaGuard Advanced costs $9,500/month and can monitor up to 20 AI models.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: It includes daily reports and Slack/PagerDuty integration, and is available via self-serve.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: NovaGuard Standard costs $3,000/month and can monitor up to 3 AI models.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: It includes weekly reports and email alerts, and is available via self-serve.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: NovaBridge is open-source and released under the Apache 2.0 license.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: It has over 4,200 GitHub stars and approximately 800 contributors.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: The base version is free.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: NovaAI has a flexible/unlimited PTO policy.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: Employees must take a minimum of 15 days per year.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: PTO requests of 3 or more days must be submitted in Workday at least 5 business days in advance.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: Sick leave is tracked separately from PTO.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: NovaAI also provides 11 paid company holidays per year.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: NovaAI is hybrid-first.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: San Francisco-based employees are required to be in the office on Tuesday and Thursday each week.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: Fully remote arrangements require approval from the direct manager, department VP, and Claudia Torres, and are reviewed annually.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_evidence.subject: NovaAI
gold_evidence.object: direct manager, department VP, and Claudia Torres

gold_entity_links.direct manager, department VP, and Claud: direct manager, department VP, and Claudia Torres

gold_claims.text: The hotel limit is $350/night in major cities (SF, NYC, London) and $250/night in other cities.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: All expenses must be submitted through Expensify within 30 days of the expense date.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_evidence.subject: NovaAI
gold_evidence.object: Too New to Rate (within 90 days of cycle)

gold_claims.text: Receipts are required for expenses over $25.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_entity_links.Too New to Rate (within 90 days of cycle: Too New to Rate (within 90 days of cycle)

gold_claims.text: NovaAI runs a bi-annual performance review cycle.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: The mid-year review calibration happens in July with results delivered by July 31.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: The annual review calibration is in January with results by January 31.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: Ratings use a 5-point scale (Exceptional, Exceeds Expectations, Meets Expectations, Developing, Unsatisfactory).
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: A rating of Developing or below triggers a PIP within 30 days.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: Airfare must be booked through TravelPerk.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: Economy class is required for flights under 6 hours.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: Business class is permitted for flights of 6 hours or more with VP+ approval.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: Expenses over $5,000 require CFO (Priya Nambiar) approval.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: NovaAI provides 16 weeks of fully paid parental leave for all parents regardless of gender, including both birthing and non-birthing parents.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_evidence.subject: NovaAI
gold_evidence.object: direct manager, department VP, and Claudia Torres

gold_entity_links.direct manager, department VP, and Claud: direct manager, department VP, and Claudia Torres

gold_claims.text: NovaAI matches 4% of salary dollar-for-dollar on 401(k) contributions.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: There is a 6-month eligibility waiting period before employees can participate.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: Each employee receives a $2,500 annual L&D budget, refreshed on January 1.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: Unused budget does not roll over.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: Requests must be submitted via the Workday L&D portal.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: James Whitfield is NovaAI's Chief Operating Officer.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: NovaAI uses Carta as its equity management platform.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: NovaAI's headquarters is at 450 Market Street, Suite 1200, with ZIP code 94105.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: Anthem Blue Cross administers NovaAI's health benefits.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: NovaGuard was launched in Q4 2023.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: NovaBridge was released in March 2024.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: GCP is NovaAI's secondary cloud provider.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: NovaAI pays an additional $300 per week for on-call duty.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: NovaAI provides a $1,500 one-time home office equipment stipend upon hire.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: NovaAI provides medical, dental, and vision health benefits coverage.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: Fatima Al-Rashid is the PM owner of NovaPilot, NovaAI's flagship product.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: Lena Park leads the UX/Design team and joined NovaAI in June 2022.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: Tanya Osei leads the SMB Sales team, and her FY2026 quota is $6M.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: Dominique Leblanc, NovaAI's Chief Revenue Officer, joined the company in June 2022.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: Rachel Huang, NovaAI's VP of Marketing, joined the company in January 2023.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: Priya Osei is NovaBridge's Developer Relations Lead, and she reports to the VP of Marketing.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: Oliver Haines, NovaAI's VP of Product, joined the company in March 2022.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: Customer Success, the department led by VP of Customer Success Amara Diallo, has an FY2026 NRR target of 118%.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_claims.text: NovaLens has a roadmap for real-time streaming via Kafka, and it is a Predictive Analytics Engine.
gold_claims.label: SUPPORTED

gold_evidence.object: SOC 2 compliance and pen testing cycles

gold_claims.text: Wei Zhang leads the Solutions Engineering team and joined NovaAI in April 2023.
